T0390.title: Vehicle Green Book
T0390.definition: In the context of auto loan fraud, refers to the official motor vehicle registration certificate, essentially the vehicle's legal identity document.
T0390.description: The motor vehicle registration certificate serves as legal proof of vehicle ownership. In auto loan fraud, it is a critical document for securing collateralized loans or illegally reselling vehicles. Fraud rings often obtain this certificate through methods such as reporting it lost and reapplying, or by deceiving clients, enabling them to illegally transfer ownership or mortgage the vehicle to cash out.

references.title: Black Market Big Data: Deconstructing the Auto Loan Fraud Industry Chain
